title: Global Financial Planning and Analytics Manager
description:
The opportunity

Hitachi Energy is seeking a Global Financial Planning and Analysis (FP&A) Manager for the Business Unit Transformers to join our innovative and forward-thinking team. In this role, you will drive financial excellence and strategic decision-making by providing insightful analysis, robust financial planning, and accurate forecasting. You will empower the organization with actionable financial insights, ensuring sustainable growth and profitability while collaborating with cross-functional teams to optimize financial performance. This is your opportunity to grow your leadership skills, contribute to the energy transition, and make a meaningful impact in a dynamic and fast-paced environment.

How you will make an impact

  • You will support the strategic direction of regions and GlobalProduct Groups by providing financial insights and conducting research on key industry trends.
  • You will facilitate the preparation and analysis of financial reports for the global business unit organization, including business planning, budgeting, and forecasting.
  • You will enhance business decision-making by crafting insightful profitability analysis for regions, factories, service units, customersegments, and product lines.
  • You will collaborate with finance professionals and function leaders across regions and countries to analyze key financial performance indicators and trends.
  • You will design and prepare advanced financial models to assess various "what if" scenarios and their potential impacts on the business unit.
  • You will lead initiatives to continuously refine financial planning and analysis processes, improving efficiency and accuracy.
  • You will standardize definitions and reporting metrics for productivity and efficiency, driving process improvements that enhance operational efficiency and profitability.
  • You will lead financial audits and ensure compliance with internal control standards, assessing and applying automation to streamline processes across the business unit.

Your background

  • Degree in Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, ora related field.
  • Minimum of 7 years of experience in financial management, with a proven track record in strategic planning, forecasting, and financial analysis.
  • In-depth knowledge of IFRS, internal controls, audit processes, and risk management practices to ensure compliance and operational integrity.
    Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills to collaborate effectively across functions and locations.
  • Advanced financial analysis, analytical and critical-thinking capabilities, with proven ability to synthesize and interpret complex financial data to inform strategic decision-making.
  • Strong commitment to continuous improvement by identifying opportunities for process optimization and leveraging digital tools to automate and enhance financial workflows.
  • Ability to inspire and guide teams, fostering a culture of growth and development.


At Hitachi Energy, we believe in fostering a collaborative and inclusive work environment. We offer opportunities for growth and development, ensuring our team members can thrive and achieve their career goals.

Join us and be part of a company that values innovation, excellence, and teamwork.

We pride ourselves on offering a holistic range of competitive benefit programs to support your financial, physical and mental wellbeing and personal development. We want you to truly thrive with us – in work and out.

For this role, depending on grade and experience, we offer the following employee benefits.

  • Employer-sponsored medical plan (inc. dental care).
  • Central Provident Fund (CPF).
  • Group Term Life insurance, Group Personal Accident insurance, Group Business Travel insurance.
  • Hospitalization Insurance.
  • Leave programs (Annual leave, medical leave, Hospitalization leave, Exam leave etc.).

*Benefits are subject to the respective plan rules.

We can provide more information during the recruitment process.

postedCompany.description:
Hitachi Energy is a global technology leader in electrification, powering a sustainable energy future with innovative power grid technologies with digital at the core. Over three billion people depend on our technologies to power their daily lives.

With over a century in pioneering mission-critical technologies like high-voltage, transformers, automation, and power electronics, we are addressing the most urgent energy challenge of our time – balancing soaring electricity demand, while decarbonizing the power system.


With an unparalleled installed base in over 140 countries, we co-create and build long-term partnerships across the utility, industry, transportation, data centers, and infrastructure sectors. Headquartered in Switzerland, we employ over 50,000 people in 60 countries and generate revenues of around $16 billion USD.
postedCompany.name: HITACHI ENERGY SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
